'''Combat Utility Vehicles''' were manufactured by [[BTS Enterprises]] and used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Characteristics==
During battles, these craft could reload the warhead armament of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and [[Missile Boat]]s and repair damaged [[Warship/Legends|warships]].
Each ship was 15 meters long and required a single pilot. The craft was equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], and two [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]]; however, it lacked [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the original [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''TIE Fighter'']] combat chamber and missions, [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports (TRN)]] and [[Spacetug/Legends|tugs]] were used as repair/rearm vehicles. The ''Defender of the Empire'' expansion introduced the dedicated Combat Utility Vehicle for this purpose.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
